stories.title: Initialize git repo and Python project scaffold
acceptance_criteria: git repo initialized with .gitignore
pyproject.toml with all dependencies defined
src/seaman_brain/ package structure created with __init__.py files
tests/ directory structure mirrors src/
config/ directory with default.toml and stage overrides
data/ directory with .gitkeep files
python -m seaman_brain --version prints version
ruff check passes with zero errors
pytest collects successfully

stories.title: Implement shared types and enums
acceptance_criteria: CreatureStage enum with 5 stages: MUSHROOMER, GILLMAN, PODFISH, TADMAN, FROGMAN
MessageRole enum with SYSTEM, USER, ASSISTANT
ChatMessage dataclass with role, content, timestamp fields
MemoryRecord dataclass with text, embedding, timestamp, importance, source fields
All types have proper type hints and are importable from seaman_brain.types
At least 3 tests covering enum values, dataclass creation, and edge cases
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement TOML config loader with Pydantic models
acceptance_criteria: SeamanConfig Pydantic model aggregating LLMConfig, MemoryConfig, PersonalityConfig
LLMConfig with provider, model, temperature, max_tokens, base_url fields
MemoryConfig with buffer_size, vector_dims, top_k, extraction_interval fields
PersonalityConfig with base_traits dict and stages_path
load_config() function reads config/default.toml and returns SeamanConfig
Stage-specific TOML files can override personality traits
At least 3 tests: default loading, missing file handling, override merging
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement LLM provider abstract protocol
acceptance_criteria: LLMProvider Protocol class with async chat() and async stream() methods
chat() takes list[ChatMessage] and returns str
stream() takes list[ChatMessage] and returns AsyncIterator[str]
Protocol is runtime-checkable
At least 3 tests verifying protocol compliance with a mock implementation
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement Ollama LLM provider
acceptance_criteria: OllamaProvider class implementing LLMProvider protocol
Configurable model name, temperature, and context window
async chat() sends messages to Ollama and returns response text
async stream() yields response chunks for streaming display
Handles connection errors gracefully with clear error messages
At least 3 tests with mocked Ollama client
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement OpenAI LLM provider
acceptance_criteria: OpenAIProvider class implementing LLMProvider protocol
Reads API key from OPENAI_API_KEY env var or config
async chat() and stream() work with OpenAI API format
Graceful handling of missing API key with helpful error message
At least 3 tests with mocked OpenAI client
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement Anthropic LLM provider
acceptance_criteria: AnthropicProvider class implementing LLMProvider protocol
Reads API key from ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var or config
Converts ChatMessage format to Anthropic's system+messages format
async chat() and stream() work with Anthropic API
Graceful handling of missing API key with helpful error message
At least 3 tests with mocked Anthropic client
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement LLM provider factory
acceptance_criteria: create_provider(config: LLMConfig) -> LLMProvider factory function
Selects provider based on config.provider string ('ollama', 'openai', 'anthropic')
Validates provider availability before returning
Raises clear error for unknown provider names
At least 3 tests covering each provider selection and error case
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement episodic memory buffer
acceptance_criteria: EpisodicMemory class with configurable max_size (default 20)
add(message: ChatMessage) appends to buffer
Buffer automatically evicts oldest messages when full
get_recent(n: int) returns last n messages
get_all() returns all messages in order
clear() empties the buffer
At least 3 tests: add/retrieve, overflow eviction, edge cases
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement embedding provider with Ollama embeddings
acceptance_criteria: EmbeddingProvider class wrapping Ollama embeddings API
Configurable model name (default: all-minilm:l6-v2)
async embed(text: str) -> list[float] returns embedding vector
async embed_batch(texts: list[str]) -> list[list[float]] for batch processing
Handles empty strings and very long texts gracefully
At least 3 tests with mocked Ollama embed calls
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement LanceDB semantic memory store
acceptance_criteria: SemanticMemory class using LanceDB for persistent vector storage
Configurable database path (default: data/lancedb/)
async add(record: MemoryRecord) stores memory with embedding
async search(vector: list[float], top_k: int) returns similar memories
Auto-creates table schema on first use
At least 3 tests with temporary database directory
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement hybrid memory retriever
acceptance_criteria: HybridRetriever class combining semantic similarity and temporal recency
async retrieve(query: str, top_k: int) returns ranked MemoryRecords
Configurable weights for similarity vs recency scoring
Handles empty memory store gracefully (returns empty list)
Re-ranks results by weighted combination score
At least 3 tests with mocked semantic memory and embeddings
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement memory extraction pipeline
acceptance_criteria: MemoryExtractor class using LLM to extract facts from conversation
async extract(messages: list[ChatMessage]) -> list[str] extracts key facts
async extract_and_store(messages, memory_store) extracts and persists
Extraction prompt focuses on: user preferences, personal info, topics, observations
Configurable extraction interval (every N messages)
At least 3 tests with mocked LLM and memory store
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement personality trait system
acceptance_criteria: 8 trait dimensions as floats 0.0-1.0: cynicism, wit, patience, curiosity, warmth, verbosity, formality, aggression
TraitProfile dataclass holding all 8 traits
Default TraitProfile for each CreatureStage
Traits loadable from stage-specific TOML config files
Trait values clamp to [0.0, 1.0] range
At least 3 tests: default profiles, stage loading, clamping
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement personality constraints and output filtering
acceptance_criteria: FORBIDDEN_PHRASES list of AI assistant cliches to strip
apply_constraints(response: str, profile: TraitProfile) -> str filters output
Strips phrases like 'As an AI...', 'I would be happy to...', 'I cannot...'
Enforces max response length based on verbosity trait
Handles empty or whitespace-only responses
At least 3 tests: phrase stripping, length enforcement, edge cases
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement system prompt builder
acceptance_criteria: PromptBuilder class assembling the system prompt for LLM calls
build(stage, traits, memories, creature_state) -> str returns system prompt
Prompt incorporates: creature identity, stage-specific behavior, trait-driven tone
Includes remembered facts about the user as context
Includes creature mood and trust level modifiers
Prompt clearly instructs LLM to stay in character as Seaman
At least 3 tests: basic build, with memories, different stages
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement creature state and persistence
acceptance_criteria: CreatureState dataclass with stage, age, interaction_count, mood, trust_level, etc.
StatePersistence class for JSON save/load to data/saves/
save(state: CreatureState, path: str) writes JSON file
load(path: str) -> CreatureState reads and validates JSON
Creates backup before overwriting existing save
Handles missing save file by returning default state
At least 3 tests: save/load roundtrip, missing file, backup creation
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement creature evolution logic
acceptance_criteria: EvolutionEngine class managing stage transitions
check_evolution(state: CreatureState) -> CreatureStage | None
Evolution conditions: interaction count thresholds, trust level, time elapsed
Stage order: MUSHROOMER -> GILLMAN -> PODFISH -> TADMAN -> FROGMAN
evolve(state, new_stage) updates state and triggers trait profile change
Cannot skip stages or devolve
At least 3 tests: no evolution, threshold reached, max stage
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement context assembler
acceptance_criteria: ContextAssembler class combining all context for LLM calls
assemble(system_prompt, episodic_messages, retrieved_memories) -> list[ChatMessage]
System prompt goes first as SYSTEM message
Retrieved memories formatted and injected as context
Episodic messages appended in chronological order
Manages total token budget across components
At least 3 tests: basic assembly, with memories, budget limits
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement conversation manager (main orchestrator)
acceptance_criteria: ConversationManager class orchestrating the full conversation flow
async process_input(user_input: str) -> str is the main entry point
Flow: add to episodic -> update state -> check evolution -> retrieve memories -> build prompt -> assemble context -> LLM chat -> filter -> store -> save
Handles graceful degradation when subsystems unavailable
async initialize() sets up all subsystems from config
async shutdown() cleanly closes connections and saves state
At least 3 tests with mocked subsystems: happy path, degradation, evolution trigger
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Implement terminal CLI interface
acceptance_criteria: Terminal UI using rich for output and prompt_toolkit for input
Displays creature stage and mood indicators in header
Streaming response display as LLM generates tokens
Debug commands: /state, /memory, /stage, /traits, /reset, /quit
Handles Ctrl+C gracefully (saves state before exit)
python -m seaman_brain launches the interactive terminal
At least 3 tests: command parsing, display formatting, graceful shutdown
ruff check passes, pytest passes

stories.title: Integration tests for full conversation loop
acceptance_criteria: Full end-to-end test with mocked LLM provider
Test: user sends message, gets personality-appropriate response
Test: memory extraction triggers after N messages
Test: creature evolves after reaching interaction threshold
Test: state persists across simulated sessions (save/load)
Test: graceful degradation when embedding service unavailable
All integration tests pass with pytest -m integration
ruff check passes, pytest passes
